title: Brickworth Down and Dean Hill
summary: Brickworth Down and Dean Hill (grid reference SU246259) is a 118.6 hectare biological Site of Special Scientific Interest in Wiltshire, notified in 1951.
text: Brickworth Down and Dean Hill (grid reference SU246259) is a 118.6 hectare biological Site of Special Scientific Interest in Wiltshire, notified in 1951.
